Brendan O’Hara MP

Contact Brendan

Newsletter

Get in touch with our friendly team:

Brendan has members of staff based in his constituency office who will be happy to assist constituents with any concerns you may have.

You can get in touch with us directly using the brendan.ohara.mp@parliament.uk email address, by filling out the contact form below, or by calling us on 01436 670587.

Please note that I can only deal with cases from constituents who live in the Argyll and Bute UK Parliamentary constituency.

Cookies
We use a few cookies. If that's OK, just click 'Accept all', otherwise click 'Settings' to modify. Things like Video & Surveys will not work without 'Experience' cookies being accepted. We use a fully privacy-first analytics solution that is fully GDPR compliant, EU-based, and does not set any tracking cookies whatsoever - plausible.io. Read our cookie policy
Settings Accept all
Cookies
Choose what kind of cookies to accept. Your choice will be saved for one year. Read our cookie policy
  • Necessary
    These cookies are not optional. They are needed for the website to function.
  • Statistics
    In order for us to improve the website's functionality and structure, based on how the website is used.
  • Experience
    In order for our website to perform as well as possible during your visit. If you refuse these cookies, some functionality, such as videos and surveys, will not work.
  • Marketing
    By sharing your interests and behaviour as you visit our site, you increase the chance of seeing personalised content and offers.
Save Accept all
